offer: For law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient citation formatting causes delays in brief submissions. We automate citation formatting and case law lookups instead of manual citation formatting and case law searches.
problem: Time-consuming citation formatting and case law lookups for brief writing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms
Indie Hackers discussions on legal workflows
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for legal tools
try_it: Let users try case law lookup tool on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
